name: node-babel7
title: node-babel7
summary: Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript
description:
Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript
Babel is a JavaScript compiler to use next generation JavaScript, today.
.
ES2015 and beyond: Babel has support for the latest version of JavaScript
through syntax transformers. These plugins allow you to use new syntax, right
now without waiting for browser support.

commands.name: babeljs-7
commands.description: The compiler for writing next generation JavaScript

commands.name: babeljs-7-node
commands.description: CLI that works exactly the same as the Node.js CLI, with the added benefit of compiling with Babel presets and plugins before running it
